pageContext.name: Warm Thoughts (Curse Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx are excited to present the Warm Thoughts (Curse Edition) Polystone Statue!  A gentle geisha toy with the pool of her mind in this incredible piece. Her tender demeanor is juxtaposed with the harsh skull that she sits on. Warm thoughts of anger and rage fuel her mind, blackening the skull and turning the insides of her mind red with rancor.   Hell hath no fury as a woman scorned. What vengeful thoughts reside in her mind? Do you dare to take a dip and find out the horrors that await the target of these thoughts?  Don't miss your chance to add this beautiful polystone statue to your collection today!
